sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 83

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 83:1
items.html:
(to the question) First Ibur
The Ibur [conception] that is for the very existence of the Partzuf is called the first Ibur. And the Ibur that is only for an addition of good — that is, for an addition of Mochin, and not for the essence of the Partzuf — is called the second Ibur. (Items 33 and 49)
